headline: Built for TestCo
subheadline: AI sales infrastructure that matches your product's velocity

challenges.title: Outbound Volume Without Quality
challenges.desc: Your SDR team sends thousands of emails weekly, but response rates are declining. Generic sequences don't reflect the depth of your product.

challenges.title: Enterprise Expansion Bottleneck
challenges.desc: Mid-market is locked in. But enterprise deals require multi-threaded outreach, deeper account intelligence, and longer nurture cycles your current stack doesn't support.

challenges.title: Signal Blindness
challenges.desc: Hiring surges, funding rounds, tech stack changes - these buying signals exist in the wild but never reach your SDRs in time to act.

challenges.title: Rep Ramp Time
challenges.desc: New SDRs take 4-6 months to hit quota. The institutional knowledge lives in top performers' heads, not in systems.

deliverables.title: Signal Engine
deliverables.desc: Trigger events - funding rounds, leadership hires, tech stack changes - automatically feed personalized sequences. No manual research needed.

deliverables.title: AI Enrichment Layer
deliverables.desc: Deep account intelligence before a rep touches a lead. Industry context, tech stack, recent news, competitive landscape, pain indicators.

deliverables.title: Pipeline Intelligence
deliverables.desc: Lead scoring, qualification automation, routing rules. Inbound scored and routed instantly. Outbound pipeline tracked end-to-end.

deliverables.title: Rep Enablement System
deliverables.desc: AI-assisted persona playbooks, objection handling, and ramp acceleration. New reps performing at target in weeks, not quarters.

engagementSteps.title: Audit & Architecture
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Map your current sales stack and workflows. Identify every manual process that should be automated. Design the target-state infrastructure.

engagementSteps.title: Build & Deploy
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Custom AI infrastructure goes live. Signal detection, enrichment pipelines, sequence automation - all wired together and tested with real data.

engagementSteps.title: Enable & Transfer
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Train your team to own the system. Documentation, runbooks, and hands-on coaching. The infrastructure runs independently after handoff.

faqItems.question: How does the engagement start?
faqItems.answer: A focused discovery session to map your current stack, workflows, and bottlenecks. I come prepared with research - the goal is to identify the highest-leverage automations within the first week.

faqItems.question: What access do you need?
faqItems.answer: Read access to your CRM and outbound tools to audit current workflows. Admin access to a sandbox environment for building and testing. Everything is documented and reversible.

faqItems.question: How does pricing work?
faqItems.answer: Fixed monthly rate for the 3-month engagement. No hourly billing, no scope creep surprises. The price reflects the value of infrastructure that compounds - not hours logged.

faqItems.question: Can we manage this independently after?
faqItems.answer: That's the entire point. Month 3 is dedicated to enablement and transfer. You'll have the knowledge, documentation, and confidence to run and iterate on everything built.

faqItems.question: What makes this different from hiring an agency?
faqItems.answer: Agencies optimize campaigns. I build infrastructure. The difference is compounding returns - once the signal engine and enrichment layer are running, they improve your entire pipeline permanently.

faqItems.question: What if we need to extend beyond 3 months?
faqItems.answer: The system is designed to be self-sustaining. But if you want to expand scope - new channels, new markets, deeper automation - we can discuss a follow-on engagement. No lock-in.
